arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag fires warning to Jose Mourinho after ex-Man Utd chief's subtle dig
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has insisted that his depleted team have nothing to fear when they lock horns with ex-boss Jose Mourinho and Fenerbahce in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag in confident mood as Man Utd target rare European victory
arts.sum: Ten Hag’s side take on Jose Mourinho’s Fenerbahce in Istanbul on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Man United boss Erik ten Hag issues Mason Mount injury update with attacker still unavailable
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Erik ten Hag provides a fitness update on Mason Mount, with the Englishman still unavailable for selection.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag responds to Jose Mourinho comments on Manchester United
arts.sum: Around six-and-a-half hours after Jose Mourinho finished his entertaining press conference, it was Erik ten Hag's turn at the Man United team hotel.

arts.ttl: Man United captain Bruno Fernandes sends perfect four-word message to Juan Mata
arts.sum: Former Manchester United midfielder Juan Mata has recently joined West Sydney Wanderers in the Australian A-League after leaving Vissel Kobe

arts.ttl: Patrice Evra blames HIMSELF and Sir Alex Ferguson for Man Utd's downfall
arts.sum: Manchester United have failed to win the Premier League title or regularly compete in the latter stages of the Champions League since Sir Alex Ferguson retired in 2013

arts.ttl: Team News: Fenerbahce vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Fenerbahce and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye THREE wonderkids to fulfil INEOS ambition
arts.sum: To continue that trend and to fulfil Ratcliffe's ambition, Man Utd are going down the route of Chelsea in trying to snap up the biggest young talents in world football. Shortly after seeing his investment in Man Utd ratified, Sir Jim Ratcliffe announced that the club's new ambition ought not to be signing Kylian Mbappe but to unearth the 'next Kylian Mbappe.'

arts.ttl: 'One of the best' - Club chief breaks silence on manager future amid Man Utd and Man City links
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City are both claimed to be preparing for life beyond their current managers and one candidate has - reportedly - caught the eye in both boardrooms.

arts.ttl: Twente coach puts Lazio in same category as Manchester United and Fenerbahce
arts.sum: FC Twente coach Joseph Oosting has said that Thursday’s Europa League opponents, Lazio, are in...
